title: Tense, tetchy but triumphant - all Arsenal eyes now on Bournemouth
summary: Arsenal edge closer to their first Premier League title in 22 years and will closely watch Tuesday's Bournemouth vs Manchester City match, which could significantly impact the tight title race.

title: PFA charity let down players, says regulator
summary: A Charity Commission investigation found the Professional Footballers' Association charity suffered from conflicts of interest and serious mismanagement, putting funds intended for struggling players at risk.
content: Conflicts of interest and "serious mismanagement" a footballers' charity put funds to help players in need at risk, a Charity Commission inquiry says.

title: West Ham relegation may cost London taxpayers £2.5m

content: London taxpayers may have to pay an extra £2.5m if West Ham are relegated from the Premier League, because of the club's lease agreement for London Stadium.

zh.title: 韦斯特汉降级可能让伦敦纳税人损失250万英镑
zh.summary: 如果韦斯特汉从英超降级,伦敦纳税人可能面临额外的250万英镑账单,这是由于该俱乐部与伦敦体育馆的租赁协议。这一财务责任强调了俱乐部与其公共投资之间的复杂关系。

title: Can you name every permanent Chelsea manager since Mourinho?
summary: Chelsea has appointed Xabi Alonso, former Liverpool midfielder, as their new manager on a four-year contract. The appointment represents a significant managerial change for the club.
content: Chelsea have appointed former Liverpool midfielder Xabi Alonso as their manager on a four‑year contract.

summary: Livingston has set a Friday closing date for applications for their new head coach position. Scott Arfield is currently in talks about a potential player-coach role with the Scottish club.
content: Livingston set a closing date of Friday for applications to be their new head coach and say Scott Arfield is in talks over a player-coach role.

content: Elversberg will become one of the smallest clubs ever to play in the Bundesliga after securing a first promotion to Germany's top flight.

title: Stories, scheduling & spectacle - five takeaways from 2025-26 WSL
summary: As the 2025-26 Women's Super League season concludes, BBC Sport examines five key questions and takeaways that defined the campaign. The analysis covers major themes and trends from the women's football season.
